description: drive_until Ok branch clones job and effects every job solely for the span stop. Fix: stop job_span with borrowed &effects BEFORE complete_job consumes them (currently the clone is taken before complete_job runs, so the observed payload is identical), pass job by value into complete_job, and drop the step entry from the job-stop metadata — step already rides work_graph.applied which is the event tests read it from (drive_test WorkGraphCaptureHandler). Verify no test reads step off the job span stop; compiler2_test effects assertions (event-time handler + durable-capture-drops-opaque test) must stay green.
title: drive.rs job loop: clone-free span payloads
